chunks.text: ORDER SHEET COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT AT LARKANA IN THE HIGH P, No 0-03 0f 2015 Order WIth signature of Judge Dale For hearing of Inain case 24-01-2018 Mr Shafi Muhammad Chandio Additional Advocate General History of petition shows that petitioner has never taken much Interest I0 pursue this petition This petition w45 lastly posted the co٧٨ 18 06 2015 and thereafter the petitioner and his counsel never took pains to get this case fixed in the court Today neither the petitioner nor his counsel are present In COuIt, Mazhar Ali Mangan advocate holding brief for learned counsel for the petitioner is not ready to plead this case In the circumstance, Ihis petition is dismissed for non prosecution _ Judge dge
